steps.title: Isolate the $p$ term
steps.content: Start with $$\frac{5}{8}p+21=61.$$ Subtract $21$ from both sides: $$\frac{5}{8}p=40.$$

steps.title: Evaluate the requested expression
steps.content: The question asks for $8p$, so $$8p=8(64)=512.$$ The answer is 512. Be careful not to stop at $p=64$; the requested expression is eight times that value.
